title: anthyllis vulneraria f. bonjeanii
intro: Anthyllis vulneraria f. bonjeanii, also known as kidney vetch or vulneraria, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the legume family. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Anthyllis vulneraria f. bonjeanii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and alleviate symptoms associated with digestive issues and urinary tract infections. It is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also used in traditional folk medicine to treat a variety of ailments.
